task_snapshots.title: 382-02: git_ops.py — conventional commits and bisect
task_snapshots.description:
Add to src/bernstein/core/git_ops.py:
- conventional_commit(diff_stat, diff_hunks, task_title): generate message from diff analysis
  - Parse git diff --cached --stat for scope (module/directory)
  - Classify change type (feat/fix/test/chore/refactor from diff content)
  - Body: 3-5 key bullets from hunks
  - Footer: Refs: #task_id, Co-Authored-By: bernstein[bot]
- bisect_regression(test_cmd, good_ref="HEAD~10"): find first bad commit on test failure

Complete tests/unit/test_git_ops.py covering both functions.

[subtask of 28550c616824]
